
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the plate

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the symbolic perception, I can identify the plate object tagged as "Plate\_57" which is visible in the scene. The plate is located at position \(x=0.62, y=0.6, z=1.08\). Since I can clearly see and identify the plate in the visual perception, I will proceed to pick it up using the PickObject tool.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Plate_57"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object Plate\_57 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=0.07, y=0.08, z=1.03\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the plate for you. The system automatically moved me to a reachable position and I was able to grasp the plate \(Plate\_57\) as requested.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>
